title: [🧲MAGNETIC JARS] Experience Jars
description: Adds experience storage jars that allow players to store, retrieve, and manage XP with visual indicators, inventory tooltips, and configurable deposit amounts
body:
Store your XP safely with Experience Jars! This mod introduces special jars that allow players to deposit, withdraw, and manage their experience with ease. Whether you want to save XP for later or transfer it between players, these jars are the perfect solution.

## 🔹 Features:
🔸 XP Storage & Withdrawal – Shift + Right-click to deposit XP into the jar, and use glass bottles to extract it as Experience Bottles.
🔸 Configurable Deposit Amount – Adjust how much XP is stored per interaction: 10, 100, 500, or MAX.
🔸 Silk Touch Requirement – Break a jar without Silk Touch, and all stored XP is lost! With Silk Touch, the jar retains its XP when picked up.
🔸 Dynamic Tooltips – Hover over a jar in your inventory to see how much XP it contains.
🔸 Visual States – Jars change appearance based on how much XP is stored inside.
🔸 XP Sounds – Enjoy immersive sound effects when storing or withdrawing XP.

💡 Keep your hard-earned XP safe and accessible whenever you need it!
